message:
feat(examples,conformance): Update examples with derive macro and enhance conformance tests

This commit updates the example applications to use the new derive macro pattern
and enhances the conformance test suite with error handling E2E tests.

Example Updates:

examples/advanced/form:
- Show proper handling of FormState to detect user abort vs completion
- Add documentation comments explaining error handling patterns
- Reference error-handling example in comments
- Extract form creation to separate function for clarity

examples/advanced/multi-component:
- Apply rustfmt formatting for consistent style

examples/basic/spinner:
- Update to use #[derive(bubbletea::Model)] pattern
- Add documentation explaining derive macro usage
- Move Model trait methods into impl block

examples/basic/textinput:
- Update to use #[derive(bubbletea::Model)] pattern
- Add documentation explaining derive macro usage

Conformance Test Updates:

tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs:
- Update test assertions and whitespace normalization
- Improve handling of ANSI escape sequences in output comparison
- Add tests for syntax highlighting output validation

tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glamour.json:
- Update expected outputs to match current Go implementation
- Fix whitespace and formatting in expected results

tests/conformance/src/benchmark_e2e.rs:
- Apply rustfmt formatting

tests/conformance/src/benchmark_validation.rs:
- Apply rustfmt formatting

tests/conformance/src/lib.rs:
- Add error_e2e module export

tests/conformance/src/error_e2e.rs (NEW):
- Add comprehensive E2E tests for error handling patterns
- Test error conversion, display formatting, and recovery
- Validate thiserror integration across all crates
- Test error chaining and context patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
